headline: Kyndryl (KD) Teams Up With Aptiv And Wind River For Mission Critical Software
summary: Kyndryl Holdings (NYSE:KD) announced a new alliance with Aptiv and Wind River to focus on mission critical software and real-time technology. The partnership is aimed at accelerating adoption of advanced software platforms in sectors that require high performance and reliability. The companies plan to combine their respective expertise in IT services, automotive technology, and real-time operating systems to develop joint solutions. Kyndryl sits at the intersection of IT infrastructure...
